data.body: unfed-liner-arson: source split DONE. outbound_comments.py (comment diff), outbound_fields.py (field diff, own _load_adf), outbound_links.py (link diff) extracted. outbound_differ.py 1545->700 LOC (under 800), re-exports the cluster (facade), adds OutboundDiffConfig, compute_outbound_mutations now takes config + returns (mutations, absent_alive_fields). reconcile.py prod caller migrated. mypy/lint/format clean on src. NEXT: migrate ~90 test call sites to OutboundDiffConfig + tuple-unpack (delegating mechanical edits, verifying full suite after).
